column1: Table 5b. Day trips and regional expenditure by state/territory visiteda,
a. All figures relate to Australian residents aged 14 years and over.
b. Components may not add due to rounding; total includes unspecified and offshore visitors that could not be allocated to a state or territory.
np. Data is not publishable as the error is too high for most practical purposes.
Source: Tourism Research Australia: Domestic Tourism Statistics
